send_to_cs: No escalations for this client, send to CS using the Support templates
For post-purchase inquiries send to CS using the Support template (shortcut: ESC)
➜ If the cx is having difficulties sending an email to CS via the link in the ESC temp - use Support 2 template (shortcut: TESC)
➜ If the cx is facing technical website issues while accessing the link, do NOT immediately send the TESC shortcut, troubleshoot first instead
For pre-purchase inquiries send to CS using the Support 2 template (shortcut: TESC)
tone: 🅿️ Use wording that is in line with the brand's voice and terminology found on the website
➜ e.g. Nova Kids, Nova Babes, Insta-worthy, slays, snatched, baddie, etc.
➜ Always look up the term's meaning before using it!
templates: For expired discounts use EXP shortcut
For login issues use LGI shortcut
promo_and_exclusions: If cx are looking for their 30% welcome code, ask to check their email (spam & promo)
Gift cards can be used on discounted items

escalate: For inquiries on in store stock/size availability, ask them what size, color, and item they want, and ESC
ESC inquiries about whether physical gift cards can be used online
ESC if a cx asks how to use store credit online
ESC inquiries about rewards points/receiving points
ESC inquiries about the survey they send to cx
ESC any inquiry about the Boca Raton store
tone: Spell out size abbreviations. (Small instead of S)
templates: For inquiries regarding a specific store information, use SL shortcut
dos_and_donts: When you can't find an item on the website it's out of stock
Cx receive rewards points in their account for in-store purchases as well!
promo_and_exclusions: Codes only work on full price items

Mixology Clothing Co: Thanks for reaching out! You can return online or in any of our store locations. If you return online you can receive a full refund or credit. If you return in store you will receive store credit only.

For more information, you can check out our detailed return policy here - https://mixology.attn.tv/ayozQw0lTPqU and here's a link to our Returns Center where you can start the process: https://mixology.attn.tv/a8nRDFTfk-sG/#/
